✔ Step 1: Go through ALL threads & ensure nothing is missing.
✔ Step 2: Organize rules into categorized markdown documents.
✔ Step 3: Print every single rule in a structured format.

📜 What Rules Need to Be Printed?
✔ Macro Schedule Rules
• Hero’s Journey Structure
• How Literature & History Shape Thematic Progression
• How Interdisciplinary & Healthcare Tie-Ins Work

✔ Weekly Structure Rules
• A/B Schedule System
• Day/Night Alternation System
• Weekly Challenge, Boss Fights, & Performance Tasks

✔ RPG System Rules
• XP Mechanics & Leveling System
• Archetype Buffs, Debuffs, & Evolution Paths
• Items, Artifacts, Curses, & Power-Ups

✔ Gameplay Rules
